prompt: what issues are assigned to me on GitHub?

assertions.name: grouped-by-repo
assertions.text: Output is grouped by repository with ## repo-name headings

assertions.name: issue-numbers
assertions.text: Issue numbers are shown with #[number] format

assertions.name: summary-footer
assertions.text: Output includes a summary footer showing total count and repos

assertions.name: assigned-badge
assertions.text: Assigned items are marked with '← assigned' badge
